creator: szuberskidamian@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #19)
I aligned the firmware to the Linux version and the result is exactly the same - kernel panic.

I'll take the tip of `main` + updated firmware and rebuild whole kernel. Let's see how it goes.

One thing I can confirm that without hw.physmem="4G" the module cannot be loaded.
